case_title: SYLVIA GOODMAN VS. DAVID J. BRIERTON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GOODMAN, SYLVIA AS TO DEFENDANT BRIERTON, DAVID J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODMAN, SYLVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIERTON, DAVID J. $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $500.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,335.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOODMAN, SYLVIA AS TO DEFENDANT BRIERTON, DAVID J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-18-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRIERTON, DAVID J.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY GOODMAN, SYLVIA BRIERTON, DAVID J.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BRIERTON, DAVID J.
